name: Chocolate Shortbread
recipeIngredient: 1 Stick (1/2 cup) cold unsalted butter, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. To make dough in a food processor: Process flour, sugar, and cocoa for a few seconds to mix. Scatter the butter over the surface and pulse on/off 4 or 5 times until coarse crumbs form. Alternatively, stir flour, sugar, and cocoa in a bowl. Cut in butter with a pastry blender or rub it in with fingers until coarse crumbs form.
3. Press the dough into an even round, 8 inches in diameter, onto an ungreased cookie sheet. Lightly score the surface with a blunt knife into 12 wedges.
4. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, or until the shortbread is dry. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack. Cut wedges all the way through and dust with confectioners sugar before removing from the sheet.
5. Makes 12
